name: CHF-1512
description: CHF1512 is a methyl-ester of levodopa (LDME), melevodopa, combined with the decarboxylase inhibitor carbidopa.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in parkinson's disease.
mechanismOfAction: CHF1512 is a safe, well tolerated and effective drug, resulting in a significantly faster onset of action, a significant decrease of the daily experience of disabling motor impairment and uncontrolled movements (dyskinesias) as well as a potential improvement in the functional ability, quality of life and non-motor symptoms associated with the disease.
